summary: Completed comprehensive testing of My Movies page feature including Diary, Watchlist, and Profile tabs. All backend APIs working (17/17 tests passed). All frontend features working correctly with proper data-testids.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/user/watchlist returns empty list for new user
Backend: POST /api/user/watchlist adds movie with all fields (tmdb_id, title, poster_path, release_date, vote_average, genres)
Backend: POST /api/user/watchlist rejects duplicate movie with 400
Backend: GET /api/user/watchlist returns added items
Backend: GET /api/user/watchlist/check/{id} returns true for movie in list
Backend: GET /api/user/watchlist/check/{id} returns false for movie not in list
Backend: DELETE /api/user/watchlist/{id} removes movie
Backend: DELETE /api/user/watchlist/{id} returns 404 for non-existent movie
Backend: All watchlist endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile accepts favorite_directors field
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns favorite_directors in profile
Backend: favorite_directors field limited to max 20 entries
Backend: POST /api/user/watch-history (Diary) adds movie to diary
Backend: GET /api/user/watch-history returns diary entries
Backend: DELETE /api/user/watch-history/{id} removes from diary
Backend: GET /api/genres returns list of genres with id and name
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile accepts favorite_genres field
Frontend: My Movies page renders at /my-movies route
Frontend: My Movies page has 3 tabs: Diary, Watchlist, Profile (data-testid='tab-diary', 'tab-watchlist', 'tab-profile')
Frontend: Diary tab: search input (data-testid='diary-search-input')
Frontend: Diary tab: search results (data-testid='diary-result-{id}')
Frontend: Diary tab: rating slider (data-testid='diary-rating-slider')
Frontend: Diary tab: date input (data-testid='diary-date-input')
Frontend: Diary tab: confirm button (data-testid='confirm-add-diary-btn')
Frontend: Diary tab: movie items (data-testid='diary-item-{tmdb_id}')
Frontend: Diary tab: remove button (data-testid='remove-diary-{tmdb_id}')
Frontend: Watchlist tab: search input (data-testid='watchlist-search-input')
Frontend: Watchlist tab: search results (data-testid='watchlist-result-{id}')
Frontend: Watchlist tab: movie items (data-testid='watchlist-item-{tmdb_id}')
Frontend: Watchlist tab: remove button (data-testid='remove-watchlist-{tmdb_id}')
Frontend: Profile tab: genre toggle buttons (data-testid='genre-toggle-{id}')
Frontend: Profile tab: actor input (data-testid='profile-actor-input')
Frontend: Profile tab: add actor button (data-testid='profile-add-actor-btn')
Frontend: Profile tab: director input (data-testid='profile-director-input')
Frontend: Profile tab: add director button (data-testid='profile-add-director-btn')
Frontend: Profile tab: movie search input (data-testid='profile-movie-search-input')
Frontend: Profile tab: movie search results (data-testid='profile-movie-result-{id}')
Frontend: Profile tab: save button (data-testid='save-profile-btn')
Frontend: FloatingNav shows 'MY MOVIES' with Bookmark icon (not 'History')
Frontend: FloatingNav navigates to /my-movies
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows 'Add to Watchlist' button (data-testid='toggle-watchlist-btn')
Frontend: Movie detail modal shows 'In Watchlist' after adding (with filled bookmark icon)
Frontend: UserDetails page (/details) does NOT have Favorite Actors section (moved to Profile tab)
Frontend: UserDetails page (/details) does NOT have Top 5 Favorite Movies section (moved to Profile tab)
Frontend: UserDetails page still has Profile Photo, Personal Info, Streaming Services, Connect Letterboxd sections
critical_code_review_comments: All required data-testids implemented correctly for automated testing
Watchlist APIs properly require authentication (401 without token)
Profile tab properly saves favorite_actors, favorite_directors, favorite_movies, and favorite_genres
Movie detail modal watchlist button correctly toggles between 'Add to Watchlist' and 'In Watchlist'
FloatingNav correctly shows 'My Movies' instead of 'History'
UserDetails page correctly no longer has Favorite Actors/Movies sections (moved to Profile tab)
test_credentials: Unique test users created per test run with timestamp-based emails
seed_data_creation: None - tests create own data dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Movies page fully tested with all 3 tabs (Diary, Watchlist, Profile). Key data-testids: my-movies-title, my-movies-tabs, tab-diary, tab-watchlist, tab-profile, diary-search-input, diary-result-{id}, diary-rating-slider, diary-date-input, confirm-add-diary-btn, diary-item-{tmdb_id}, remove-diary-{tmdb_id}, watchlist-search-input, watchlist-result-{id}, watchlist-item-{tmdb_id}, remove-watchlist-{tmdb_id}, genre-toggle-{id}, profile-actor-input, profile-add-actor-btn, profile-director-input, profile-add-director-btn, profile-movie-search-input, profile-movie-result-{id}, save-profile-btn, toggle-watchlist-btn. Watchlist APIs: POST/GET/DELETE /api/user/watchlist, GET /api/user/watchlist/check/{tmdb_id}. Profile update accepts favorite_directors field. JWT auth required - token stored as 'chef_token' in localStorage.
